theme: Archetype 3: Pastel & Soft (Neo-Brutalist Twist, Light Theme)
rationale: For an Indian college audience (Gen Z) and marketers at collegeop.com, standard SaaS blue is invisible. A Neo-Brutalist approach with pastel color blocking, hard black lines, and unapologetic borders creates an approachable, high-energy, and highly legible dashboard for social media ad management.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl tracking-tighter font-black uppercase text-black

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Mode B: The 'Control Room' Grid. Strict grid hierarchy for dashboard panels. Use gap-6 or gap-8. Every pixel utilized.

surfaces.card_style: bg-white border-2 border-black rounded-none shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out p-6
surfaces.button_primary: bg-[#FFD84D] text-black border-2 border-black rounded-none shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:translate-y-[2px] transition-all duration-200 font-bold px-6 py-3 uppercase tracking-wider
surfaces.button_secondary: bg-white text-black border-2 border-black rounded-none shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:translate-y-[2px] transition-all duration-200 font-bold px-6 py-3 uppercase tracking-wider
surfaces.input_style: bg-white text-black border-2 border-black rounded-none shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none focus:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] transition-all px-4 py-3

components_instructions.sidebar_navigation: Solid pastel background (e.g., Lavender or soft gray) with a thick 2px black right border. Navigation items should have generous padding. Active links get a solid black background with white text, or a vibrant pastel block with black text and border.
components_instructions.websites_manager_table: Use standard HTML elements nested in a Neo-Brutalist card. Headers need thick bottom borders (border-b-2 border-black). Striped rows with very subtle gray, strong black text.
components_instructions.gallery_grid: Bento layout for the ad library. Images MUST NOT exceed 80vh. The generated ads (images/videos) should be inside cards with thick borders.
components_instructions.status_badges: Square or slightly rounded (rounded-sm) blocks with border-2 border-black. High contrast font.
components_instructions.modals_dialogs: No glassmorphism. Use a solid black backdrop (bg-black/60). The modal itself must be a solid white or pastel card with border-2 border-black and large shadow-[8px_8px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)].
components_instructions.charts_stats: Dashboard stats should use massive fonts (text-5xl or text-6xl) with tight tracking. Use pastel backgrounds for different metric cards (e.g., Yellow for Drafts, Mint for Approved, Blue for Downloaded).
components_instructions.testing: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

icons.style: Stroke width 2.5 or 3, strict black, no gradients.

image_urls.description: Group of diverse college students studying. Use this for empty states or welcome banners to keep the college context alive.
Person holding a smartphone showing social media. Use as a fallback placeholder for ad previews before generation.
Pastel geometric polyhedral wall. Perfect for the login screen background to match the Neo-Brutalist/Pastel vibe.

developer_instructions: Use JS/JSX only. Do not use TypeScript.
Avoid Shadcn 'Card' wrappers if they restrict raw HTML structures; build Neo-Brutalist cards manually with divs to ensure the heavy shadows and borders work perfectly.
For interactive logic (Dropdowns, Tabs), you may use Shadcn primitives but OVERRIDE their default Vercel-like styling to match the hard borders and solid colors specified in surfaces.
Add data-testid attributes to ALL buttons, inputs, links, and major layout sections.
Never use generic light grays for text. All text must be high-contrast text-black or text-neutral-900.
Use 'react-fast-marquee' for a slow-moving ticker at the top of the dashboard showing peak traffic times or recent ad generation status.
